title: Reservation
calendarHint: Click the start and end dates · At least one night's stay
occupiedHint: The crossed-out dates are booked—please check if another villa is available for the same period.
priceNote: Entire villa · up to 6 guests · self-catering · “{tier}” rate
priceEmpty: Select your check-in and check-out dates to view the price.
name: Name
notePlaceholder: Please let us know if you have any additional information regarding your reservation...
termsSuffix: and the rules for using the cottage.

toast.datesOccupiedVilla: The dates you selected are already booked for this villa—please choose a different time frame.
toast.dateOccupied: This date is already booked for {villa}. Please select a different villa from the form—another one may be available for the same period.
toast.minOneNight: At least one night's stay—check-in and check-out cannot be on the same day.
toast.rangeOccupied: This period includes dates when {villa} is booked. Please select an available date range or check another villa.
toast.pickDates: Please select your check-in and check-out dates.
toast.rangeHasOccupied: The selected dates are already booked for this villa. Please select another date.
toast.success: Your reservation has been successfully submitted! We'll be in touch soon.
toast.error: An error occurred while submitting the reservation.
